projects.title: My
projects.subtitleDesktop: Click and drag to explore the projects.

p1.title: Hotel Management Platform
p1.description: A hotel management application built in C# with a MySQL database. It handles rooms, guests, bookings and real-time revenue tracking.
p1.problem: The hotel managed rooms, guests and bookings manually with spreadsheets, causing double-bookings and no real-time visibility on occupancy or revenue.
p1.solution: A C# desktop application backed by MySQL, centralizing rooms, guests, bookings and billing in one place.
p1.impact: Staff track occupancy and revenue in real time, cutting manual booking errors and speeding up check-in.

p2.title: EyeGuard Dashboard
p2.description: A smart monitoring interface built with Python. It streams video, detects motion and generates security alerts through a modern dashboard.
p2.problem: The site had no affordable way to monitor its premises or get notified automatically when something unusual happened.
p2.solution: A surveillance dashboard streaming live video and running motion detection with OpenCV, raising alerts through a Django-powered interface.
p2.impact: Round-the-clock monitoring without dedicated security staff, with instant alerts on suspicious activity.

p3.title: Stock Management Platform
p3.description: A PHP web dashboard for inventory management, tracking products, orders, suppliers and stock levels in real time.
p3.problem: Inventory, orders and suppliers were tracked manually, leading to frequent stockouts and no visibility into real stock levels.
p3.solution: A PHP/MySQL web dashboard centralizing products, orders, suppliers and stock levels with real-time updates.
p3.impact: Real-time stock visibility cut stockouts and significantly reduced inventory reconciliation time.

p4.title: AI Face Attendance System
p4.description: A smart attendance system based on facial recognition using Django, Python and OpenCV. It records presence automatically via webcam with a management interface for attendance, employees and students.
p4.problem: Manual attendance sign-in sheets were slow to process and easy to falsify.
p4.solution: A facial-recognition attendance system (Django + OpenCV) that automatically records presence via webcam, with a management interface for staff and students.
p4.impact: Automated, tamper-resistant attendance tracking that saves administrative time every single day.

p5.title: Hospital Management System
p5.description: A desktop application built with Java and JavaFX to manage patients, doctors, appointments, medical records and treatment history in a secure, intuitive environment.
p5.problem: The clinic needed a secure, unified way to manage patients, doctors, appointments and medical records without paper files.
p5.solution: A Java/JavaFX desktop application with a MySQL database covering patients, doctors, scheduling and treatment history.
p5.impact: Centralized, secure patient records and scheduling, reducing administrative overhead and errors.

p6.title: Medical Appointment Management
p6.description: A full-stack medical booking solution with a React web interface, a secure Spring Boot API, and an Android mobile app in Java/Kotlin. Patients can book, edit or cancel appointments while doctors manage their schedule and consultation history.
p6.problem: Patients and doctors lacked a modern way to book, manage and track medical appointments across web and mobile.
p6.solution: A full-stack solution: a React web app, a secure Spring Boot API, and a native Android app (Java/Kotlin) letting patients book, edit or cancel appointments while doctors manage schedules and consultation history.
p6.impact: Streamlined scheduling for patients and doctors across devices, reducing no-shows and administrative back-and-forth.

about.title: About

teaser.title: behind the code
teaser.text: Hey, I'm Mohamed — a Software Engineer from Marrakech who designs and builds high-performing web and mobile products for brands that want to stand out online.

mission.title: My Mission
mission.p1: A Computer Science & Networks Engineer (MIAGE) based in Marrakech, I combine technical rigor with an entrepreneurial vision to digitize your business.
mission.p2: A specialist in robust backend development (Java/Spring Boot), I design scalable full-stack solutions: from building high-performing e-commerce stores (Shopify & Custom) to implementing connected business dashboards. I deliver architectures built to streamline your processes and maximize your conversion.

ux.title: User Experience
ux.description: Crafting intuitive interfaces that users love

problem.title: Problem Solving
problem.description: Turning complex challenges into elegant solutions

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: Always exploring new technologies and best practices

j1.title: Final-Year Project (PFE) — Full-Stack Developer
j1.description: Redesign and optimization of AGRISED, an application for managing the technical and economic performance of farms. Built a full mobile + API solution for field data collection and automated KPI calculation (gross margin, productivity, agroecoscore), with analytics dashboards and reporting. Stack: Spring Boot, React Native, PostgreSQL, Docker, Agile/Scrum.

j2.title: Full-Stack Web Development Intern
j2.description: Design and development of Norsys Eval, a SaaS platform with a marketing site and online subscription management. Built a modern React front office and an admin back office, secure authentication and role management with Keycloak, PayPal payment integration and automated code quality checks with SonarQube. Agile/Scrum with two-week sprints.

j3.title: Full-Stack Web Development Intern
j3.description: Design and development of a library management platform (borrowing, returns and reservations) for the Faculty of Arts and Humanities. Built an intuitive, efficient solution to manage resources and improve the user experience, working closely with library staff to meet their specific needs.

j4.title: Engineering Degree — Computer Science & Networks (MIAGE)
j4.description: Engineering degree focused on software development, network administration, systems architecture, artificial intelligence and IT project management. Advanced skills to design, build and secure technological solutions.

j5.title: Specialized Technician in Digital Infrastructure — Software Development
j5.description: Training focused on systems administration, network management, virtualization, cybersecurity and technical support. Practical skills to deploy and maintain secure digital infrastructures.

process.title: How your project comes to life

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: Understanding your brand, audience and goals so the site speaks to the right people.

content.title: Content & Structure
content.description: Defining the pages, content and features your project actually needs.

design.title: Design
design.description: Crafting a visual direction that fits your brand and makes it memorable.

development.title: Development
development.description: Building a fast, responsive, production-ready website or application.

launch.title: Launch & Support
launch.description: Going live, with a clear handover and support after launch.

pricing.disclaimer: Every offer is tailored to your needs — we work out the exact scope and price together after an initial conversation.

cost.q: How much does a website cost?
cost.a: It depends on your needs. A simple site starts at the base price above; the calculator gives a first estimate and I send a tailored quote after a quick call.

start.q: What do I need to get started?
start.a: Just your idea and goals. If you have a logo, texts or images, great — if not, I can help create them.

time.q: How long does a project take?
time.a: A showcase website usually takes 1 to 3 weeks; larger apps depend on scope. I share a clear timeline before we start.

revisions.q: What if I don't like the design?
revisions.a: We work in rounds. You see previews early and revisions are included until the design feels right.

chatbot.q: Can you add an AI chatbot?
chatbot.a: Yes — I integrate custom AI assistants trained on your content to answer clients and capture leads around the clock.

support.q: Do you offer support after launch?
support.a: Absolutely. I offer maintenance, updates and improvements after launch, with no mandatory monthly fees.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By engaging Koda Atlas ("we", "us") for web, mobile, or software development services, you ("client") agree to the following terms. These terms apply to all quotes, proposals, contracts, and work carried out unless a separate signed agreement states otherwise.

services.title: Services
services.body: Koda Atlas provides custom web and mobile application development, e-commerce solutions (including Shopify), UI/UX design, AI chatbot integration, and related digital consulting services. The exact scope of each project is defined in a written quote or proposal before work begins.

quotes.title: Quotes & Payment
quotes.body: All quotes are estimates based on the information provided by the client and are non-binding until confirmed in writing. Projects typically require an upfront deposit before work begins, with the balance due upon delivery or according to a milestone schedule agreed in the proposal. Late payments may result in a pause of ongoing work.

timeline.title: Timeline & Revisions
timeline.body: Estimated timelines are shared before a project starts and depend on timely feedback and content from the client. A reasonable number of revision rounds is included in each proposal; additional revisions beyond the agreed scope may be billed separately.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: Upon full payment, the client owns the final deliverables (code, designs) created specifically for their project, excluding any third-party libraries, frameworks, or licensed assets, which remain governed by their own licenses. Koda Atlas retains the right to showcase completed projects in its portfolio unless the client requests otherwise in writing.

clientResponsibilities.title: Client Responsibilities
clientResponsibilities.body: The client agrees to provide timely feedback, content, and access to any accounts or systems needed to complete the project. Delays caused by the client may extend the project timeline accordingly.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: Koda Atlas is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of delivered work. Our total liability for any claim is limited to the amount paid for the specific service in question.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: Either party may terminate a project with written notice. In case of termination, the client pays for work completed up to that point; any deposit already paid is non-refundable unless otherwise agreed.

law.title: Governing Law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Morocco. Any dispute will first be addressed through good-faith discussion between the parties.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms can be sent to ouledelabd.mohamed@gmail.com.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Koda Atlas ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects the personal data you share when using this website or contacting us.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: When you use our contact form, we collect the information you provide: your name, email address, phone number (optional), website (optional), project type, and message content. We do not collect payment information through this website.

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUse.body: We use the information you submit solely to respond to your inquiry, prepare a quote, and discuss your project. We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.body: Contact form submissions are processed through EmailJS, a third-party email delivery service, solely to deliver your message to us by email. We do not share your data with any other third party for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: Cookies & Local Storage
cookies.body: This site uses your browser's local storage to remember your theme preference (light/dark) and language choice (English/French). No advertising or tracking cookies are used.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: We retain contact form submissions only as long as necessary to respond to your inquiry and, if you become a client, for the duration of our working relationship plus any period required by applicable law.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us at ouledelabd.mohamed@gmail.com. Depending on your location, you may have additional rights under applicable data protection law (such as Morocco's Law 09-08 or the EU's GDPR).

security.title: Security
security.body: We use Cloudflare Turnstile to protect our contact form from spam and abuse. Reasonable technical measures are in place to protect the data you share with us.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about this policy, contact us at ouledelabd.mohamed@gmail.com.
